Class AsiDesktopAgiConfig

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.agi.event.BasicPropertyChangeSource
uno.anahata.asi.agi.AgiConfig
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.SwingAgiConfig
uno.anahata.asi.destkop.swing.AsiDesktopAgiConfig
All Implemented Interfaces:
PropertyChangeSource, Rebindable
public class AsiDesktopAgiConfig extends SwingAgiConfig
The default AgiConfig implementation for the standalone Swing application. It pre-registers the GeminiAiProvider.
Author:
anahata

  • Constructor Details

    • AsiDesktopAgiConfig

      public AsiDesktopAgiConfig(AbstractAsiContainer asiConfig)
      Constructs a new configuration for a fresh agi session.
      Parameters:
      asiConfig - The parent ASI container.

    • AsiDesktopAgiConfig

      public AsiDesktopAgiConfig(AbstractAsiContainer asiConfig, String sessionId)
      Constructs a new configuration for a restored agi session.
      Parameters:
      asiConfig - The parent ASI container.
      sessionId - The unique ID of the session being restored.
